title: megalastrum marginatum
intro: Megalastrum marginatum is a species of fern in the family Osmundaceae, native to Central and South America. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Megalastrum marginatum include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing pain and swelling, promoting wound healing, and fighting off infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
